lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: My name is Hari.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what are you doing here Hari?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Like most people who come to Edgeville, I am here to seek adventure in the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: I found a secret underground river that will take me quite a long way north.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Underground river? Where does it come out?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: It comes out in a pond located deep in the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: I had to find a very special type of canoe to get me up the river though, would you like to know more?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you teach me about canoes?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Well, you don't look like you have the skill to make a canoe.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: You need to have at least level 12 woodcutting.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Once you are able to make a canoe it makes travel along the river much quicker!

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: It's really quite simple. Just walk down to that tree on the bank and chop it down.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: When you have done that you can shape the log further with your axe to make a canoe.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: I can sense you're still a novice woodcutter, you will only be able to make a log canoe at present.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that good?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: A log will take you one stop along the river. But you won't be able to travel into the Wilderness on it.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: You are an average woodcutter. You should be able to make a Dugout canoe quite easily. It will take you 2 stops along the river.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I take a dugout canoe to reach the Wilderness?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: You would never make it there alive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Best not to try then.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: You seem to be an accomplished woodcutter. You will easily be able to make a Stable Dugout

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: They are reliable enough to get you anywhere on this river, except to the Wilderness of course.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Only a Waka can take you there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A Waka? What's that?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Come and ask me when you have improved your skills as a woodcutter.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Your skills rival mine friend. You will certainly be able to build a Waka.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A Waka? What's that?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: A Waka is an invention of my people, it's an incredible strong and fast canoe and will carry you safely to any destination on the river.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any destination?

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: Yes, you can take a waka north through the underground portion of this river.

lines.speaker: Hari
lines.text: It will bring you out at a pond in the heart of the Wilderness. Be careful up there, many have lost more than their lives in that dark and twisted place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, not right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you teach me about canoes?
